Version
  • API Reference
  • Telemetry
  • Telemetry

Telemetry

The telemetry system records spans and events for agent, chat client, and tool invocations. It follows OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for Generative AI via the GenAIConventions submodule. Use instrument! to attach telemetry middleware to an agent in a single call.

Span Management

AgentFramework.TelemetrySpan — Type
TelemetrySpan

Represents a span/activity in a trace, following OpenTelemetry span semantics.

Fields

  • id::String: Unique span identifier.
  • parent_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Parent span ID for nested traces.
  • name::String: Span name (e.g., "agent.run", "chat.completion").
  • kind::Symbol: :internal, :client, or :server.
  • start_time::DateTime: UTC start time.
  • end_time::Union{Nothing, DateTime}: UTC end time (set on finish).
  • status::Symbol: :unset, :ok, or :error.
  • attributes::Dict{String, Any}: Key-value span attributes.
  • events::Vector{Dict{String, Any}}: Timestamped span events.
AgentFramework.finish_span! — Function
finish_span!(span; status=:ok) -> TelemetrySpan

Mark a span as finished with the given status.

AgentFramework.add_event! — Function
add_event!(span, name; attributes=Dict{String,Any}())

Append a timestamped event to the span.

AgentFramework.duration_ms — Function
duration_ms(span) -> Union{Nothing, Int}

Return span duration in milliseconds, or nothing if not yet finished.

Backends

AgentFramework.AbstractTelemetryBackend — Type
AbstractTelemetryBackend

Abstract telemetry backend. Implement record_span! to integrate with OpenTelemetry, Datadog, or any other observability system.

AgentFramework.LoggingTelemetryBackend — Type
LoggingTelemetryBackend <: AbstractTelemetryBackend

Log-based backend using Julia's Logging module. Emits structured log messages at the configured level for each completed span.

AgentFramework.InMemoryTelemetryBackend — Type
InMemoryTelemetryBackend <: AbstractTelemetryBackend

In-memory backend for testing — stores all recorded spans in a thread-safe vector.

AgentFramework.record_span! — Function
record_span!(backend, span)

Record a finished span to the telemetry backend.

AgentFramework.get_spans — Function
get_spans(backend::InMemoryTelemetryBackend) -> Vector{TelemetrySpan}

Return a copy of all recorded spans.

AgentFramework.clear_spans! — Function
clear_spans!(backend::InMemoryTelemetryBackend)

Remove all recorded spans.

Middleware

AgentFramework.telemetry_agent_middleware — Function
telemetry_agent_middleware(backend) -> Function

Create an agent middleware that records agent invocation spans with GenAI semantic convention attributes.

AgentFramework.telemetry_chat_middleware — Function
telemetry_chat_middleware(backend) -> Function

Create a chat middleware that records LLM call spans with request/response attributes.

AgentFramework.telemetry_function_middleware — Function
telemetry_function_middleware(backend) -> Function

Create a function middleware that records tool invocation spans.

AgentFramework.instrument! — Function
instrument!(agent::Agent, backend::AbstractTelemetryBackend) -> Agent

Add telemetry middleware to an agent for all three pipeline layers (agent, chat, function). Returns the modified agent.

GenAI Conventions

The GenAIConventions submodule provides attribute name constants that follow the OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for Generative AI.

AgentFramework.GenAIConventions — Module
GenAIConventions

Constants following OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for Generative AI.
